---
title: "Referendums and the European Union: A comparative inquiry"
author: "Mendez, F., Mendez, M., and Triga, V."
date: 2014-01-01
description: "Cambridge University Press"
doi: "10.1017/CBO9781139524117"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/book.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.1017/CBO9781139524117](https://doi.org/10.1017/CBO9781139524117)
